$schema: Spec F2 T18 — chat-SSE interleave fixture
description: Synthesised four-rounds-of-tool-calls flow that mirrors DeepSeek's post-Spec-11 stream behaviour. Used by streaming-text-renderer.test.tsx (regression suite) and re-runnable by the in-tree harness at /scratch/streaming for the T26 pre-flight live-smoke step.

context.scenario: User asks Astrid about a Norwegian tenancy mould issue; Astrid performs four-rounds of web_search calls then issues a final synthesis.
context.stream_envelope: chat SSE (bare payload per frame, D-09-1)

spec11_fixes_exercised.name: Hallucinated tool name recovers via _dispatch wrapper
spec11_fixes_exercised.verification: Round 3 simulates a fake tool name; the tool_result frame has is_error=true; the renderer continues painting text after recovery without console errors.
spec11_fixes_exercised.client_test: renders text correctly after a is_error tool_result

spec11_fixes_exercised.name: Assistant message tool_calls serialised on OpenAI/DeepSeek path
spec11_fixes_exercised.verification: Each round's tool_calling frame is followed by a tool_result frame with matching call_id; the text continues normally on assistant's next chunk.
spec11_fixes_exercised.client_test: paints text from multi-round interleave correctly

spec11_fixes_exercised.name: Streaming call_id empty — id_by_index synthesises call_{idx}
spec11_fixes_exercised.verification: Round 2's tool_calling frame has call_id='' on the first delta and 'call_1' on the continuation; the renderer's text path is unaffected (cues are MessageElement state).
spec11_fixes_exercised.client_test: doesn't crash on call_id continuation with empty id

spec11_fixes_exercised.name: Metadata key tool_call_id vs call_id — canonical key read
spec11_fixes_exercised.verification: Round 4's tool_result has metadata under 'call_id' (post-fix) AND a defensive 'tool_call_id' shadow; text rendering unaffected.

spec11_fixes_exercised.name: Step-history compaction split — _recent_start walks past dangling tool
spec11_fixes_exercised.verification: First frame is a tool_result (compacted-boundary edge case where the assistant tool_calls was dropped before the recent window); the renderer correctly handles a stream that doesn't start with text.
spec11_fixes_exercised.client_test: handles a stream that starts mid-conversation with a tool_result-first message

data.content: Section 5-1: landlord must hand over the property in tenantable condition.

data.delta: Good — the landlord's habitability duty is in §5-1.

data.content: Section 5-7: tenant may demand remedy within a reasonable time.

data.delta: And §5-7 gives you the right to demand the remedy.

data.content: ToolNotAllowedError: 'search_legal_database' not in persona's allow-list. Available tools are: web_search, web_fetch.

data.delta: Let me reach via the available tool instead.
In summary: §5-1 + §5-7 are your statutory levers; Husleietvistutvalget handles the dispute.

expected_final_text:
Let me search the husleieloven for §§ 5-1 and 5-7.

Good — the landlord's habitability duty is in §5-1. 

And §5-7 gives you the right to demand the remedy. 

Let me reach via the available tool instead. 

In summary: §5-1 + §5-7 are your statutory levers; Husleietvistutvalget handles the dispute.
